scripts.test: pnpm test:unit && pnpm build && pnpm test:acceptance
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter @cubid/core build && pnpm --filter @cubid/auth build && pnpm --filter @cubid/aptos build && pnpm --filter @cubid/browser build && pnpm --filter @cubid/bitcoin build && pnpm --filter @cubid/cardano build && pnpm --filter @cubid/comms build && pnpm --filter @cubid/cosmos build && pnpm --filter @cubid/evm build && pnpm --filter @cubid/near build && pnpm --filter @cubid/polkadot build && pnpm --filter @cubid/solana build && pnpm --filter @cubid/starknet build && pnpm --filter @cubid/stellar build && pnpm --filter @cubid/sui build && pnpm --filter @cubid/tezos build && pnpm --filter @cubid/wallet-recovery build && pnpm --filter @cubid/wallet-recovery-react build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.validate:yeet: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:unit && pnpm build && pnpm test:acceptance && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm docs:api:check && pnpm check:core-package
